overview: A functional medicine practice that provides comprehensive evaluation and personalized treatment planning for chronic health conditions, including autoimmune disorders, neurological issues, and gut dysfunction.
highlights: Comprehensive functional medicine testing and lab analysis
Personalized Functional Medicine Roadmap with nutrition and lifestyle guidance
targetAudience: Patients seeking treatment for chronic conditions such as autoimmune disorders, neurological issues, gut dysfunction, post-COVID symptoms, and unexplained fatigue.
